ddls:
CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "judge_name" TEXT /* Name of the judge */,
  "judge_type" TEXT /* Type of judge (e.g., Senior, Junior, Chief) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courtrooms" (
  "courtroom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each courtroom */,
  "courtroom_name" TEXT /* Name of the courtroom */,
  "courtroom_location" TEXT /* Location of the courtroom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("courtroom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_types" (
  "case_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case type */,
  "case_type" TEXT /* Type of court case (e.g., Jury Trial, Sentencing, Status Conference) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court case */,
  "case_number" TEXT /* Case number (e.g., 17-cr-0135) */,
  "case_title" TEXT /* Case title (e.g., USA v. PALMER) */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge assigned to the case */,
  "courtroom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the courtroom where the case is being heard */,
  "case_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case type */,
  "case_status" TEXT /* Status of the case (e.g., Open, Closed, On Hold) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the case hearing */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the case hearing */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the case hearing */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hearings" (
  "hearing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hearing */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case associated with the hearing */,
  "hearing_type" TEXT /* Type of hearing (e.g., Jury Trial, Sentencing, Status Conference) */,
  "hearing_date" TEXT /* Date of the hearing */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the hearing */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the hearing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hearing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the court official */,
  "official_role" TEXT /* Role of the court official (e.g., Judge, Lawyer, Clerk) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)
column_names: Type of judge (e.g., Senior, Junior, Chief)
